propp_functions.name: Initial Situation
propp_functions.description: The members of a family are enumerated, or the hero is introduced.

propp_functions.name: Absentiation
propp_functions.description: One of the members of a family absents himself from home.

propp_functions.name: Interdiction
propp_functions.description: An interdiction is addressed to the hero.

propp_functions.name: Reconnaissance
propp_functions.description: The villain makes an attempt at reconnaissance.

vogler_stages.name: Ordinary World
vogler_stages.description: The hero's normal life before the journey begins.

vogler_stages.name: Call to Adventure
vogler_stages.description: Something shakes up the situation, either from external pressures or from something within the hero.

vogler_stages.name: Refusal of the Call
vogler_stages.description: The hero feels the fear of the unknown and tries to turn away from the adventure.
